meaning: n.泰晤士河(流经牛津,伦敦等)
examples: It's on the north bank of the Thames.
The Thames rises in the Cotswold hills.
This poster sells the virtues of travel on the Thames.
Mr Alexander's new pay package was approved by Thames Water's parent company, German utility giant RWE.
The water company Thames Water has doubled the salary of its chief executive, Bill Alexander.
